settings.title: Monster Piercing | Nipple Rings
settings.text:
Nipple piercings are a bold and stylish body modification choice, and we offers a wide selection of high-quality nipple jewelry to suit every taste. Whether you prefer barbells or rings, our collection includes a variety of designs crafted from materials such as surgical steel, titanium, and gold, all of which are safe for body piercings. 

Nipple bars and rings come in various thicknesses and lengths, allowing you to choose the perfect fit for your piercing. For those who like to make a statement, we offer jewelry adorned with crystals, opals, or unique decorative elements, while our classic designs provide a more subtle, minimalist look. Nipple piercings require durable, comfortable jewelry that is also easy to clean, and our collection ensures both style and functionality. Whether you're newly pierced or looking to upgrade your existing jewelry, Monster Piercing provides a variety of options to help you express your personal style with confidence.

settings.question: What types of nipple jewellery do you offer?
settings.answer:
We offer a curated selection of threadless nipple bars, internally and externally threaded barbells, and nipple shields. Each piece is crafted to professional standards for comfort, safety, and secure
wear.

settings.question: What are the differences between threaded, threadless, and shield styles?
settings.answer:
• Threadless nipple bars feature a push-fit design where the decorative ends are held in place by tension — smooth, easy to insert, and ideal for sensitive piercings.
  • Threaded nipple bars have screw-on ends. Internally threaded options are preferred by piercers for smooth insertion and less irritation.
  • Nipple shields consist of a barbell with a decorative outer ring that sits around the piercing, creating an ornate and eye-catching look.

settings.question: Are your nipple bars comfortable to wear daily?
settings.answer: Yes. Our threaded and threadless nipple bars are designed for secure, long-term wear. They have a smooth finish and minimal edges to prevent irritation or snagging during everyday activities.

settings.question: Can I change the ends on my nipple bar?
settings.answer: Yes. Threadless and internally threaded nipple bars allow you to swap decorative ends easily, letting you mix and match styles for a custom look. Ensure you only change jewellery once the piercing is fully healed.
